images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning adult Japanese idol‑style model reclining on a poolside sunbed at golden hour, wearing a sleek black leather biker jacket draped over a sheer white silk camisole that accentuates her slim waist and ample bust, the jacket’s matte leather catching the soft teal‑orange cinematic light.
